name: people
description: Per-person notes under spice/people/<First Last>.md, with hub at spice/people/People.md and shared rendering via people-rendering mechanism. Materializes Templater folder template + global People nav-button. v0.2.0: migrated NewPersonButton dataviewjs helper to entity-create@0.1.0 declarative new_entity_buttons[] with safe-filename validate predicate; scripts/new-person-button.js deleted. v0.2.0 follow-up: removed body_template (Template, People.md Templater syntax + own-frontmatter block incompatible with entity-create); frontmatter_template carries the static-known person fields (company/location/title/email/website/aliases/phone/tags); inline_body carries the PersonNavButtons + PeopleRendering mention-list dataviewjs blocks. Legacy auto-move directive is redundant because entity-create's destination already writes the file at spice/people/<name>.md.

new_entity_buttons.label: + New Person

post_install.message: people@0.1.0 installed. Open spice/people/People.md to see the hub. Click '+ New Person' to create. Existing People notes (if migrated from a consumer vault) survive as long as they live under spice/people/.

bootstrap_contributions.prompt: Inner-circle people for iMessage filtering (comma-separated names)
